notes: FF backbone (5x384, layer 1 frozen, K=24, theta=2.0, per-layer Adam lr=3e-4, B=256) trained to completion: 14000/14000 round-robin steps in ~102s with periodic hard-negative ridge refits every 500 steps (50% top-K=5 hard / 50% unigram). Closed-form ridge readout fit on N_fit=80000 features of dim 1536 (concat LN(a_2..a_5)) with lambda=1.0; train-subset acc 0.2951 on 20K samples. Eval at ~920 char/s (one forward + matvec per char vs 256 forwards in pass 1) finished in 65s. Val char-acc 0.2792 -- a 19% relative lift over pass-1's 0.2351 but below the spec's honest target of 0.35; still well below the 0.70 DQ floor. Random-projection-ridge diagnostic was NOT run (not needed: FF features did beat pass-1 goodness, so the FF representation adds non-trivial value, just not enough for >=0.35).
